headline: 30 MW Barrow Green Hydrogen Project Achieves Final Investment Decision with Plug Power Electrolyzer Supply
summary: GenEco™ PEM electrolyzers to power industrial hydrogen production facility in Barrow-in-Furness, CumbriaSLINGERLANDS, N.Y., May 20, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Plug Power Inc. (NASDAQ: PLUG), a global leader in comprehensive hydrogen solutions for the hydrogen economy, today announced that the 30-megawatt (MW) Barrow Green Hydrogen project in Barrow-in-Furness, Cumbria (UK), where Plug is supplying electrolyzers, has reached final investment decision (FID).
